/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Looper_VST3.dir/link.d  -o Looper_artefacts/Release/VST3/Looper.vst3/Contents/x86_64-linux/Looper.so CMakeFiles/Looper_VST3.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Looper_VST3.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Looper_VST3.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Looper_VST3.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Looper_VST3.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Looper_VST3.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Looper_VST3.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Looper_VST3.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o  Looper_artefacts/Release/libLooper_SharedCode.a /usr/lib/libasound.so /usr/lib/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib/libfreetype.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread -flto
